title: Split Feature Flag Definition
description: The complete targeting definition of a feature flag within a specific environment, including treatments, targeting rules, percentage-based rollouts, and kill status.

name.description: Name of the feature flag this definition belongs to

killed.description: Whether the flag is killed, forcing all evaluations to return the default treatment

treatments.description: List of possible treatments that this feature flag can return during evaluation

defaultTreatment.description: The treatment returned when no targeting rules match or when the flag is killed

baselineTreatment.description: The control treatment used as a baseline for experimentation comparisons

rules.description: Ordered list of targeting rules evaluated top to bottom; the first matching rule determines the treatment

defaultRule.description: The default percentage-based rollout applied when no targeting rules match

trafficAllocation.description: Percentage of traffic included in feature flag evaluation (0-100)

lastModified.description: Unix timestamp of the last modification to this definition

creationTime.description: Unix timestamp of when this definition was created

EnvironmentRef.description: A reference to the environment where this definition is active

TrafficType.description: A traffic type defining the kind of entity that feature flags target

id.description: Unique identifier for the traffic type

Treatment.description: A treatment representing one of the possible values returned by a feature flag evaluation

name.description: Name of the treatment (e.g., on, off, v1, v2)

description.description: Description of what this treatment does

configurations.description: JSON string containing dynamic configuration associated with this treatment

TargetingRule.description: A targeting rule that matches specific conditions and assigns treatments to matching traffic

buckets.description: Percentage-based distribution of treatments for traffic matching this rule

Condition.description: A condition defining the matching criteria for a targeting rule

combiner.description: Logical combiner for multiple matchers within this condition

matchers.description: List of matchers that define the matching criteria

Matcher.description: A matcher defining a single matching criterion based on attributes, segments, or key values

negate.description: Whether to negate the matcher result

attribute.description: The attribute name to match against

strings.description: String values used by string-based matchers

number.description: Numeric value used by numeric matchers

date.description: Unix timestamp value used by date-based matchers

between.description: Range values for the BETWEEN matcher

depends.description: Dependency configuration for the DEPENDS_ON matcher

splitName.description: Name of the feature flag to depend on

treatments.description: Treatments that must be returned by the dependency

Bucket.description: A bucket defining the percentage of traffic assigned to a specific treatment

treatment.description: Name of the treatment assigned to this bucket

size.description: Percentage of traffic allocated to this bucket (0-100)
